summary: Reviewed the inbox runner and paired delegate together as an end-to-end readonly smoke path. Verdict: needs_revision. The wrapper is aligned with the evidence-backed/read-only intent and avoids overstating success, but the delegate report schema does not match the wrapper’s success-classification expectations, causing successful runs to be downgraded to partial. Additional issues include no explicit pass-through of --dry-run to the delegate, weak report discovery/parsing assumptions, and delegate status semantics that can mark runs successful even when per-file partial results exist.
notes: Used supplied artifact snapshots as grounded review evidence.
Evaluated wrapper and delegate together rather than narrowing scope to one file.
Review artifact content generated at the required path.
